name: Nusskipferl (Nut Crecents)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
Filling:
1. In a separate bowl, beat 3 large egg whites until soft peaks form.
2. Add ground nuts, sugar (or to taste), and vanilla extract to the beaten egg whites.
3. Mix in the nut filling thoroughly.
Dough:
4. Combine yeast, flour, softened butter, and egg yolks in a large mixing bowl.
5. Mix until a dough forms. Cover and let rest for 1 hour.
6. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch (about 3 mm).
7. Cut rectangles measuring approximately 2 x 3 inches.
8. Spread each rectangle with about 1 tablespoon of nut filling.
9. Roll up each rectangle into a jelly roll lengthwise.
10. Place the rolled-up pastries on greased baking sheets, shaping them into crescent forms.
11. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned and golden.
12. Allow to cool on wire racks before storing in an airtight container.
Makes: 4 to 5 dozen crescents.
